## Meeting Purpose

[Explore Jessalynn Jones' experience and fit for the Managing Editor role at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/j8VQm7jf7kx__74bXbkA16LZRkZT9wy1?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jessalynn has strong content strategy experience, emphasizing problem-solving, keyword research, and balancing high-volume/high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/j8VQm7jf7kx__74bXbkA16LZRkZT9wy1?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [She's comfortable with and enjoys people management, valuing mentorship and fresh perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/j8VQm7jf7kx__74bXbkA16LZRkZT9wy1?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [growthx.ai is actively working on balancing AI-driven high-volume content production with maintaining exceptional quality](https://fathom.video/share/j8VQm7jf7kx__74bXbkA16LZRkZT9wy1?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Jessalynn seeks a collaborative, growth-oriented environment with open communication and strategic alignment](https://fathom.video/share/j8VQm7jf7kx__74bXbkA16LZRkZT9wy1?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Focuses on understanding customer pain points and developing educational content to address them](https://fathom.video/share/j8VQm7jf7kx__74bXbkA16LZRkZT9wy1?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Balances foundational keywords for topical authority with zero-volume keywords for future trends](https://fathom.video/share/j8VQm7jf7kx__74bXbkA16LZRkZT9wy1?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Shared success story: Rapidly developed comprehensive brand strategy for B2B/B2C client during COVID, increasing web traffic by \~1000% in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/j8VQm7jf7kx__74bXbkA16LZRkZT9wy1?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

### People Management Experience

  - [Previously held Director of Outbound role with direct reports](https://fathom.video/share/j8VQm7jf7kx__74bXbkA16LZRkZT9wy1?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Enjoys mentoring and encouraging career development](https://fathom.video/share/j8VQm7jf7kx__74bXbkA16LZRkZT9wy1?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Values the reciprocal nature of management: mentoring others while gaining fresh perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/j8VQm7jf7kx__74bXbkA16LZRkZT9wy1?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### growthx.ai's Content Quality Strategy

  - [Flexibility in prioritizing volume vs. quality based on client needs](https://fathom.video/share/j8VQm7jf7kx__74bXbkA16LZRkZT9wy1?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Considering hiring experts for highly technical clients (e.g., AI cybersecurity)](https://fathom.video/share/j8VQm7jf7kx__74bXbkA16LZRkZT9wy1?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)

### Jessalynn's Career Aspirations

### growthx.ai Work Environment
